title: senecio munnozii
intro: Senecio munnozii, also known as Andean wormwood, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio munnozii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. Traditional herbal preparations of Senecio munnozii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to support the immune system and alleviate various health conditions.
